name: Grilled Sweet-Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil (simmer) potatoes in salted water for 15-30 minutes, then rinse under cold water to cool.
2. Peel the cooled potatoes and cut them into 1/2-inch-thick slices.
3. Prepare the grill by whisking together oil, salt, and cumin in a small bowl. Brush some of this mixture onto both sides of each potato slice, reserving any leftover for later.
4. Grill the potato slices on an oiled rack set 5 to 6 inches over the glowing coals for about 1 minute on each side until golden brown.
5. Transfer the grilled potato slices to a platter using tongs.
6. Thinly slice the scallion diagonally and sprinkle over the potatoes.
7. Whisk together the remaining cumin oil, lime juice, salt, and pepper in another small bowl.
8. Drizzle the dressing over the potatoes.
9. Serve the potato salad with lime wedges and sprinkled coriander leaves. Serves 6.
Suggested additions: toasted pecans, cooked sausage, or for the dressing, chopped chipotle chili in adobo sauce.
